sentences.arabic: كِتَابُ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة" هُوَ مَجْمُوعَةٌ مِنَ الْقِصَصِ الْقَدِيمَةِ عَلَى لِسَانِ الْحَيَوانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga "Kalila i Dimna" je zbirka starih priča u kojima govore životinje.
sentences.translationEn: The book "Kalila and Dimna" is a collection of ancient stories told through animals.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ الْأَسَدُ وَالثَّعْلَبُ فِي هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتِ عَنِ الْحِكْمَةِ وَالْعَدْلِ.
sentences.translation: Lav i lisica u ovim pričama govore o mudrosti i pravdi.
sentences.translationEn: The lion and the fox talk about wisdom and justice in these tales.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ ابْنُ الْمُقَفَّعِ هَذَا الْكِتَابَ بِأُسْلُوبٍ سَهْلٍ وَمُمْتِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Ibn al-Muqaffa je napisao ovu knjigu jednostavnim i zanimljivim stilom.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn al-Muqaffa wrote this book in an easy and enjoyable style.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْأَطْفَالُ وَالْكِبَارُ دُرُوسًا مُفِيدَةً مِنْ هَذِهِ الشَّخْصِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i odrasli uče korisne lekcije od ovih likova.
sentences.translationEn: Children and adults learn useful lessons from these characters.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقِصَصُ تُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى فَهْمِ الْحَيَاةِ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ove priče nam pomažu da bolje razumijemo život.
sentences.translationEn: These stories help us understand life better.
